legacy.content:
# Phase 37-01 Plan: KAPLAY construction and vector assignment docs
## Objective
Document end-to-end construction of a simple KAPLAY game using engine runtime vectors.
## Tasks
1. Publish a minimal construction guide with code snippets. 2. Document vector assignment responsibilities: - content packs define vectors - KAPLAY renders hints and diagnostics 3. Add feature-space troubleshooting and validation checklist. 4. Link guide from engine docs, KAPLAY spec, and GRD.
## Verification
- Docs route is discoverable in guides nav. - Example snippets compile against current engine exports.
